title: KEYGEN COLLAB: THE RETURN
description:
WHOA-MY-GOSH I'M ON THE FRONT PAGE AGAIN. THANKS KGJB!!!!

http://www.keygenjukebox.com/

Yep. Another keygen collab. With KeygenJukebox back up and running better than ever, what better way to celebrate than start another one?

This time around,since I'm giving you all this ENORMOUS TIME LIMIT, I want to see your best, most amazing, kick-assiest YTPMVs for the collab. These videos will be judged more intensely than the last time, and there will be no exceptions to overused sources/songs.

THIS MEANS I BETTER NOT SEE ANY TF2, OFFICE HORN, MILKSHAKEMAN, I.M. MEEN, OR ANY OF THAT BULLCRAP. NO EXCEPTIONS.

Also, returning contenders, please don't reuse sources from last time. I'd like to see some pure originality in this one.

NOW GO AND MAKE SOME AWESOME ENTRIES.
